description: Agent orchestration optimizations — parallel reviewer invocations + concurrent sprint-contract generation

parallel_reviewer_invocations.description: In --parallel N mode, N Reviewer agents now run concurrently instead of sequentially
parallel_reviewer_invocations.before: Review phase wallclock = sum(N × single-review-time) ≈ N × ~30s
parallel_reviewer_invocations.after: Review phase wallclock = max(single-review-time) + 10s overhead ≈ ~40s regardless of N
parallel_reviewer_invocations.improvement_formula: O(N) → O(1) relative to task count
parallel_reviewer_invocations.constraint: Verdict outcomes identical — each Reviewer receives same diff as sequential
parallel_reviewer_invocations.measurement_note: Runtime-only metric — requires actual CC session with harness-work --parallel

concurrent_sprint_contract_generation.description: Breezing Phase A generates all sprint contracts concurrently
concurrent_sprint_contract_generation.before_formula: Phase A duration = sum(per-task contract time) ≈ N × ~5s
concurrent_sprint_contract_generation.after_formula: Phase A duration = max(per-task contract time) + 10s overhead ≈ ~15s for 5 tasks
concurrent_sprint_contract_generation.measurement_note: Runtime-only metric — requires CC session with harness-work --breezing

runtime_baseline: N/A — Phase 62 baseline file captures only Go-level guardrail benchmarks, not orchestration wallclock
